pi_items.source: task description and verifier scripts (setup_task.sh, export_result.sh)
task description requiring generation of rows from 2026-01-01 to 2026-01-31
setup_task.sh data planting scenarios and export_result.sh specific checks

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a view named DAILY_INVENTORY_FULL from the source table INVENTORY_LOG. The data is entirely synthetic and created via SQL INSERT statements during environment setup. The task specifically targets January 2026 (2026-01), which has 31 days. The synthetic data includes three specific product IDs to test different scenarios: 500 (standard gaps), 501 (late start requiring initial zeros), and 502 (multiple updates on the same day).
